LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS MICHAEL TIMBERMAN AND SHIRLEY TIMBERMAN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF COMPLAINT ENTERED ON 9/26/08. COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT IN DEFENDANTS' FAVOR UNDER CCP 664-6. SEE VIEJO BANCORP, INC. VS. WOOD, (1989) 217, CAL.APP. 3RD 200, 206. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-18-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MICHAEL TIMBERMAN AND SHIRLEY TIMBERMAN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Anthony Soldato, Esq. of Zacks & Utrecht 956-8100 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Off Calendar, Dismissal of complaint entered on 9/26/08. Court lacks jurisdiction to enter judgment in Defendants' favor under CCP 664-6. See Viejo Bancorp, Inc. vs. Wood, (1989) 217, Cal.App. 3rd 200, 206. Order signed in open court. (302/AJR) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR# 8620
